---
name: Walkthrough
about: Propose or update an end-to-end system design walkthrough.
title: "Walkthrough: "
labels: ["type:walkthrough"]
assignees: ""
---

## Goal

What complete system should this walkthrough teach, and which design pressures
should it emphasize?

## Deliverable

Target path:

```text
docs/walkthroughs/[system-name].md
```

## Scope

- User problem:
- Version 1 boundary:
- Main constraints:
- Out of scope:

## Acceptance Checklist

- [ ] Problem statement is clear.
- [ ] Functional and non-functional requirements are separated.
- [ ] Core entities are named.
- [ ] API sketch is included.
- [ ] Read path and write path are explained.
- [ ] Data model and source of truth are clear.
- [ ] Component choices include alternatives and trade-offs.
- [ ] Original Mermaid architecture diagram is included.
- [ ] Additional flow, sequence, or failure-mode diagrams are included when useful.
- [ ] Consistency decisions are explicit.
- [ ] Scaling strategy is tied to estimates or bottlenecks.
- [ ] Failure modes and recovery behavior are included.
- [ ] Security, privacy, or abuse concerns are included.
- [ ] Observability and operating signals are included.
- [ ] Cost considerations are included.
- [ ] Version 1 simplification and 10x changes are separated.
- [ ] Related pages are linked.
- [ ] Content follows `CONTENT_GUARDRAILS.md` and is not a copied interview answer, book summary, or course substitute.
- [ ] Available checks are run, or missing checks are noted.
